hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -q 'processcheck-html/js/.*\.js$'; then cd /Users/injooncha/processcheck/processcheck-html && ./node_modules/.bin/eslint "$file" 2>&1 || true; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env 파일 수정 금지' && exit 1; fi
